prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DUSTER-EBD2603-12-PARENT Product Type: DUST_REMOVAL_TOOL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Universal Dual Head Flexible Telescopic Extendable Duster 46.5in - 5 Colors Description: This microfiber duster is unlike anything you've used before. The two heads are adjustable cutting your cleaning time in half. It also makes it easier to clean light bulbs or chandeliers. This duster extends up to 46.5" allowing you to reach even the toughest of spots tops of bookcases, refrigerators, cabinets, Ceilings, Moldings, or Window Blinds. You could clean two blades of your ceiling fan at once or clean out that had to reach vent.

Feather dusters are essential for the home and important for keeping the house clean from dust that can contain remnants of allergens. This duster is made with microfiber which traps this dust and keeping it from spreading around your house ensuring your house will be free of allergens. This feature makes it a must-have for those with allergies, young children, or pets.

With the extendable feature, you will have an easy reach as you dust, or you can quickly bring it down to 10 inches and easily fit it in small spaces to store it away. You could store it in your housekeeping kit or keep in the corner of your office. Search Terms: home garden office dusting cleaning Features: (none) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 46.5in Dual Head Flexible Telescopic Duster

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 46.5-in Universal Dual Head Telescopic Extendable Duster

tokens.name: Universal Dual Head Flexible Telescopic Extendable Duster

anthropic.title_differentiation: Adjustable Dual Heads, Extends To 465 Inches, Microfiber Traps Allergens, Collapses To 10 Inches, Ideal For Ceiling Fans And High Surfaces

openai.title_differentiation: Dual Microfiber Heads, Flexible Telescoping Reach, Cleans Blinds Fans Ceilings, Traps Dust And Allergens
